## Summary
- What changed?

## Why
- Why is this needed?

## Scope
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Release metadata update

## Validation
- [ ] Build passes locally (`dotnet build`)
- [ ] Behavior tested manually
- [ ] No breaking changes expected

## Checklist
- [ ] Title follows conventional style (for example: `feat: ...`, `fix: ...`, `docs: ...`)
- [ ] PR description is complete
- [ ] If needed, README/docs were updated
